item.title: Kimi K2.7 and GLM 5.2 Now Available in Devin Desktop and CLI
item.description: Kimi K2.7 and GLM 5.2 are now available in Devin Desktop and CLI. Both models deliver strong FrontierCode Extended scores and won't consume quota for Pro, Max, and Teams plans until July 5.

item.title: Introducing Security in Devin Review
item.description: Every pull request in Devin Review now gets a security review. Devin catches auth bypasses and logic flaws that pattern-matching scanners miss, with full remediation from finding to fix.

item.title: Update on Claude Fable 5 in Devin
item.description: As of June 12, 2026, access to Claude Fable 5 has been removed from Devin following Anthropic's latest announcement and the US government directive. All other models remain available, including Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5.

item.title: Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Claude Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf with the full intelligence of Opus 4.7 and ~2.5x higher output speeds.

item.title: Fast and Comprehensive Code Review, Now in Windsurf
item.description: Devin Review and Quick Review bring verification into the same workspace where you write code.

item.title: Windsurf 2.0: Introducing the Agent Command Center and Devin in Windsurf
item.description: Ship more with local and cloud agents working together.

item.title: Windsurf is now Devin Desktop. The IDE you love, with more features. Learn more →Windsurf is now Devin Desktop →
